note: MEASURED opus baseline (k=1 blind single-shot, 2026-06-09; SINK markers stripped + neutralized). 118 agent cases + 3 floor anchors = 121. J=0.917 (TPR 0.917, FPR 0.0): tp=111 fn=10 fp=0 tn=121. HONEST: replaces the INFLATED sonnet-J=1.0 (which came from commit 751f9be 'category fixes' + a perfect-by-construction snapshot; the real sonnet run was J=0.835, QA-8 2026-06-07). Of the 10 FN, only 2 are GENUINE misses (py-mcp-tokenpassthrough/data-exfil, py-rag-poisoning); the other 8 are CATEGORY disagreements where opus found the vuln at the exact line but chose a different (often defensible) vocab category (LLM05 improper-output-handling vs LLM06 excessive-agency; JWT crypto vs AuthN/AuthZ; secret crypto vs config). Detection-recall (line-level, category-agnostic) = 116/118 = 0.983; FPR=0 (perfect precision). The 2 genuine misses + the AI-class category ambiguity are outer-loop fuel (sec-learn / a category-lenient scorer per spike-11). k=1 single-shot (non-deterministic); a k>=3 bootstrap hardens the gate. Cost: 30 opus subagents, ~728K tokens.
